mapper.sql: id, number_source_id, user_id, patient_name, patient_id_card, fee, status, appointment_time, pay_time, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, u.phone as user_phone FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN number_source ns ON a.number_source_id = ns.id LEFT JOIN schedule s ON ns.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE s.doctor_id = #{doctorId} ORDER BY a.appointment_time DESC
SELECT FROM appointment WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY appointment_time DESC
SELECT FROM appointment WHERE number_source_id = #{numberSourceId} ORDER BY appointment_time DESC
SELECT FROM appointment WHERE number_source_id = #{numberSourceId} AND status != 4 ORDER BY appointment_time DESC
SELECT FROM appointment ORDER BY appointment_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appointment (number_source_id, user_id, patient_name, patient_id_card, fee, status, appointment_time) VALUES (#{numberSourceId}, #{userId}, #{patientName}, #{patientIdCard}, #{fee}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointment a LEFT JOIN number_source ns ON a.number_source_id = ns.id LEFT JOIN schedule s ON ns.schedule_id = s.id WHERE s.visit_date = #{date}
